channel.title: doyouknow.app - English
channel.description: Surprising facts about UAE, Saudi Arabia, and the world.

item.title: Grand Egyptian Museum: Complete Visitor Guide
item.description: Plan your visit to the Grand Egyptian Museum near Giza: what's inside, the complete Tutankhamun collection, ticket types, opening hours, and practical tips.

item.title: Egyptian Hieroglyphs: How Ancient Writing Worked
item.description: How Egyptian hieroglyphs actually worked as a writing system: phonetic and word signs, cartouches, hieratic and demotic scripts, and how they were deciphered.

item.title: Tutankhamun: Facts About the Boy King
item.description: Key facts about Tutankhamun: his short reign, the 1922 discovery of his tomb by Howard Carter, the golden mask, the curse myth, and how he actually died.

item.title: Egyptian Mummies: How Mummification Really Worked
item.description: How ancient Egyptian mummification actually worked, step by step: natron drying, organ removal, canopic jars, linen wrapping, and where to see royal mummies today.

item.title: Rosetta Stone: Facts About the Key to Hieroglyphs
item.description: How the Rosetta Stone was discovered, what it actually says, how it unlocked hieroglyphs in 1822, and why Egypt wants it back from the British Museum.

item.title: Egyptian Pharaohs: Guide to Ancient Egypt's Rulers
item.description: Who were Egypt's pharaohs? A guide to the role, power, and most important rulers of ancient Egypt, from Djoser and Khufu to Hatshepsut, Ramesses II, and Cleopatra.

item.title: Valley of the Kings: Complete Visitor Guide
item.description: Plan your visit to the Valley of the Kings in Luxor: history, Tutankhamun's tomb, ticket types, which tombs to prioritize, and practical tips for 2026.

item.title: DEWA Setup and Bills: Moving Into a Dubai Home
item.description: A move-in guide for DEWA activation, deposits, green bills, tariff logic, Ejari links, final bills, and practical monthly utility planning in Dubai.

item.title: Dubai Traffic Fines: Checking, Paying, Black Points
item.description: A resident guide to checking Dubai traffic fines, paying through official channels, understanding black points, vehicle impoundment, and avoiding repeat penalties.

item.title: Ancient Egypt History: Complete Timeline Guide
item.description: A complete timeline of ancient Egyptian history, from the unification of Upper and Lower Egypt around 3100 BCE through the Old, Middle, and New Kingdoms to Cleopatra.

item.title: Emirates ID: Application, Renewal, and Replacement
item.description: A resident-focused Emirates ID guide covering ICP applications, renewal timing, replacement cards, typing centers, delivery, and expiry fines.

item.title: Great Sphinx of Giza: Facts, History & Mystery
item.description: Facts about the Great Sphinx of Giza: its size, who built it, why its nose is missing, the Dream Stele, and what archaeologists know versus what remains debated.

item.title: Renting in Dubai: Ejari, RERA Calculator, Cheques
item.description: A practical Dubai renting guide explaining Ejari, tenancy contracts, RERA rent guidance, cheques, deposits, notices, and move-in paperwork.

item.title: UAE Residence Visas Compared: Work, Green, Golden, Family
item.description: A decision-tree guide comparing UAE residence visa tracks for employees, freelancers, investors, families, students, retirees, and long-term residents.

item.title: UAE School Year 2026-27: Terms, Fees, and Admissions
item.description: A parent-focused UAE school year guide for 2026-27 covering KHDA, ADEK, admissions timing, fees, calendars, documents, and practical planning.

item.title: Best Brunches in Dubai
item.description: An evergreen guide to Dubai brunches by format, neighborhood, cuisine, atmosphere, family suitability, booking style, and how to choose without stale prices.

item.title: Dubai Art & Culture Scene
item.description: Explore Dubai art and culture through Alserkal Avenue, museums, heritage districts, galleries, design spaces, festivals, and practical planning tips.

item.title: How Much Does It Cost to Register a Company in Dubai?
item.description: An evergreen cost framework for Dubai company registration, covering license tiers, offices, visas, government fees, compliance, banking, and renewal planning.

item.title: Dubai Driving & Car Ownership Guide
item.description: A descriptive Dubai driving and car ownership guide covering resident licences, road habits, buying, renting, insurance, Salik, parking, and practical safety.

item.title: Dubai for Families
item.description: Plan Dubai with kids using this family guide to attractions, parks, beaches, malls, school context, transport, heat planning, and relaxed itineraries.
